channel.title: coap on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in coap on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Connecting Thread Devices to the Internet over CoAP
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: In my earlier IoT series, we explored Thread networks and protocols—how they form self-healing IPv6 mesh networks designed for low-power IoT environments. We looked at connectivity over UDP and TCP/HTTP protocols, and how Thread devices can reach the internet using a Border Router. In this article, we move one step further by implementing CoAP (Constrained Application Protocol) — a lightweight, REST-style protocol built on UDP and optimized for constrained devices and low-bandwidth networks.
